title: update image sfx duo to automation_images#415
body:

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *Luap99*, *timcoding1988* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [Luap99] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

/hold

Do not merge, I thought there were some infra problems as two rawhide tasks just were listed scheduled since yesterday but the GCE VMs showed them us running but someone it is stucked in a retry loop connecting to the google metaddata server?

Seeing stuff like this in a loop
```
[   30.076248] audit: type=1130 audit(1755771684.791:89): pid=1 uid=0 auid=4294967295 ses=4294967295 subj=system_u:system_r:init_t:s0 msg='unit=google-guest-agent comm="systemd" exe="/usr/lib/systemd/systemd" hostname=? addr=? terminal=? res=failed'
[   30.203906] audit: type=1130 audit(1755771684.919:90): pid=1 uid=0 auid=4294967295 ses=4294967295 subj=system_u:system_r:init_t:s0 msg='unit=sshd comm="systemd" exe="/usr/lib/systemd/systemd" hostname=? addr=? terminal=? res=failed'
Aug 21 05:21:24 packer-68a5db67-9c23-20a8-9b7a-b470ef7254b8 google_guest_agent[748]: ERROR instance_setup.go:168 Failed to reach MDS after attempt to recover network configuration(all retries exhausted): exhausted all (100) retries, last error: request failed with status code: [-1], error: [error connecting to metadata server: Get "http://169.254.169.254/computeMetadata/v1/?alt=json&recursive=true&timeout_sec=60": dial tcp 169.254.169.254:80: connect: network is unreachable]
Aug 21 05:21:24 packer-68a5db67-9c23-20a8-9b7a-b470ef7254b8 systemd[1]: google-guest-agent.service: Main process exited, code=exited, status=1/FAILURE
```

I killed the VMs and rerun the tasks one passed the other one could the same error again. So something in the rawhide images triggers a flake during early cloud setup, we cannot merge this as I don't see this on other PRs so it is almost certainly a problem with the new rawhide image.
